description: Your traps persist 50% longer, covering more of the battlefield for longer.
Your traps cover 50% more ground — larger zones, bigger explosions, wider triggers.
Place traps 30% more often. Keep the battlefield saturated.
tooltipTemplate: Trap placement interval cut to {cooldownMultiplier%} of base.

description: Your traps hit 35% harder — more damage, stronger slows, stronger marks.
tooltipTemplate: Trap damage, slow strength, and mark bonus all increased by {effectMultiplier+%}.

description: Your explosive traps detonate a second time 2 seconds after the initial blast.
tooltipTemplate: Explosive Trap detonates a second time {aftershockDelaySeconds:1}s after the initial blast.

description: Caltrops: enemies take ramping bonus damage the longer they stay in the zone (+2 DPS per second, up to +12 DPS). Resets when they leave.
tooltipTemplate: Caltrops: enemies gain +{rampPerSecond} DPS per second in the zone (max +{maxBonusDamagePerSecond} DPS). Resets on exit.

description: Marker Trap: marked enemies also deal 20% less damage for the duration of the mark.
tooltipTemplate: Marker Trap: marked enemies deal {weakenedMultiplier%} less damage for the mark's duration.

description: Fire Pit: applies its damage as a burn debuff. Duration refreshes while enemies stand in the pit, and the burn continues for 4 seconds after they leave.
tooltipTemplate: Fire Pit: damage is applied as a burn debuff that continues for {burnDurationSeconds:1}s after leaving the zone.
